title: Recovering at Home: 5 Key Benefits of Post-Surgery Physiotherapy
excerpt: Don't let travel hinder your recovery. Discover how receiving expert physiotherapy at home after surgery can speed up healing, improve safety, and provide personalized care when you need it most.
content: Detailed content about the benefits of at-home physiotherapy, covering convenience, personalized one-on-one attention, reduced risk of infection, family involvement, and a comfortable environment for recovery. This post would internally link to the Physiotherapy service page and the main booking page.
